## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest agent_core/tests/ -q`)
- [ ] New code has tests (all mocked — no network, LLM, or external services)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No new dependencies without discussion (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No secrets committed; no emoji in code (ADR-005)
